name: Flex
visual_summary: A flexible layout component that arranges children horizontally or vertically. Useful for creating responsive and adaptable UI elements. Developers would use it to achieve complex layouts with minimal effort.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Flex
Description: A flexible layout component that arranges children horizontally or vertically. Useful for creating responsive and adaptable UI elements. Developers would use it to achieve complex layouts with minimal effort.
Style: standard, responsive
Interactions: 
Tags: layout, component, flexible

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):

export { FLEX_STYLE_PROPS_DATA } from './flex-props';
export { Flex } from './Flex';
